summary: Commercial Management App - Full E2E Testing Complete. All core functionality working perfectly. Backend APIs 100% functional with proper CRUD operations, stock management, invoicing, and export features. Frontend UI fully functional with responsive design, all modules accessible, proper data integration, and smooth user experience. Successfully tested invoice creation with automatic stock reduction, dashboard real-time stats, search/filter functionality, and French localization.

minor_issues.issue: Returns status 200 instead of 201 for CREATE operations
minor_issues.impact: Low - Functionality works correctly, only HTTP status code deviation from REST standards

passed_tests: Dashboard loads with correct stats (CA: 63,720 FCFA)
Products CRUD - create, view, edit, delete operations
Invoice creation with automatic stock reduction (50→47)
Inventory creation and validation with stock updates
CSV export functionality for all entities
Search filters and status filters functioning
French localization and FCFA currency formatting
No JavaScript errors or console issues
